title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, return indices of the two numbers that add up to `target`.

title: Reverse String
description: Write a function that reverses a string. The input string is given as an array of characters.

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Given a string containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.

title: Maximum Subarray
description: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum and return its sum.

title: Binary Search
description: Implement binary search to find target in sorted array. Return index or -1 if not found.

title: Palindrome Number
description: Given an integer x, return true if x is a palindrome (reads same backward as forward).

examples.explanation: 121 reads as 121 from left to right and right to left

title: Fibonacci Number
description: Return the nth Fibonacci number. F(0) = 0, F(1) = 1.

title: Merge Sorted Arrays
description: Merge two sorted arrays into one sorted array.

title: First Unique Character
description: Find the first non-repeating character in a string and return its index. If it doesn't exist, return -1.

title: Contains Duplicate
description: Return true if any value appears at least twice in the array.
